# T R Cycles

**Summary**: Cycles of sea-level rise (transgression) and fall (regression).

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] identified T-R cycles to map the evolution of the Dhruma Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] Key for identifying stratigraphic units and reservoir potential.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] Analyzed via morphogroup distribution and diversity indices.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The D7 Unit shows a clear transgressive-regressive cycle from Atash to Hisyan members. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 65]])
